creator: perky@python.or.kr
text:
>By the way, pseudo.grad.sccs.chukyo-u.ac.jp does not seem to be
>resolvable.  Would you please check if/to where the site has moved?
>
>Also, I heard that 1.3 had been released with the licence changed.
>I'd appreciate if you could check it out as well.  Thank you.
>

I was unresolvable 1 hours ago. but I can resolve it. and the site works
perfectly. 

akaraka(perky):/usr/ports/japanese>$ nslookup pseudo.grad.sccs.chukyo-u.ac.jp 
Server:  ns.dacom.co.kr
Address:  164.124.101.2

Name:    pseudo.grad.sccs.chukyo-u.ac.jp
Address:  150.42.18.44

and.. Author announced that 1.3 is under BSD-like license now.
(it was under GPL.) yeah~~~

This is patch for update to 1.3
fixing on 3rd line of SITE is for typo. :)

diff -ruN pycodec.orig/Makefile pycodec/Makefile
--- pycodec.orig/Makefile	Sun Jun 24 03:11:52 2001
+++ pycodec/Makefile	Sun Jun 24 04:13:26 2001
@@ -6,11 +6,11 @@
 #
 
 PORTNAME=	pycodec
-PORTVERSION=	1.2.2
+PORTVERSION=	1.3
 CATEGORIES=	japanese python converters
 MASTER_SITES=	http://pseudo.grad.sccs.chukyo-u.ac.jp/~kajiyama/python/ \
 		ftp://ftp2.python.or.kr/pub/FreeBSD/ports/distfiles/ \
-		ftp://www3.kr.freebsd.org/~perky/distfiles/
+		http://www3.kr.freebsd.org/~perky/distfiles/
 DISTNAME=	JapaneseCodecs-${PORTVERSION}
 
 MAINTAINER=	perky@python.or.kr
diff -ruN pycodec.orig/distinfo pycodec/distinfo
--- pycodec.orig/distinfo	Sun Jun 24 03:09:14 2001
+++ pycodec/distinfo	Sun Jun 24 04:11:20 2001
@@ -1 +1 @@
-MD5 (JapaneseCodecs-1.2.2.tar.gz) = aaeece10025d48647f2b9766f1d35517
+MD5 (JapaneseCodecs-1.3.tar.gz) = 8b17a8178d881fa617d2d18d2b88b1f0
